title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 56.095 - Annual report required (second class and certain first class counties)
text:
56.095.  Annual report required (second class and certain first class counties). — The prosecuting attorney in counties of the first class not having a charter form of government and in counties of the second class shall make an annual report in November of each year to the county commission, stating the number of misdemeanors and felonies occurring within such county, which have been prosecuted by him or his assistants the preceding year.
(L. 1965 p. 150 § 7, A.L. 1973 H.B. 670)
